description:
The old src/ir_interp.rs (built on value::Value, no production consumers) is now superseded by src/ir_interp_v2.rs. Delete it; rename the new one.

## Acceptance

- src/ir_interp.rs is the FzValue-based interp.
- No file named ir_interp_v2.rs.
- cargo test green; matrix green.
title: Delete legacy ir_interp.rs, rename ir_interp_v2 → ir_interp
